title: Intricately Smoky Middle Eastern Chicken Fattoush
description: A smoky and creamy Middle Eastern dish featuring sriracha and shio-koji-cure, served in a bamboo steamer.
instructions: Preheat the bamboo steamer by filling the bottom with water and bringing it to a boil.
In a large bowl, whisk together sriracha sauce, shio-koji, lemon juice, and olive oil to make the marinade.
Add the chicken to the marinade and mix well to coat, then let it sit for 10 minutes.
Place the chicken in the bamboo steamer and steam for 15 minutes or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, toast the pita bread by baking it in the oven at 350 degrees for 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, and feta cheese.
Once the chicken is done, let it cool for a few minutes before slicing it into thin strips.
Add the sliced chicken to the bowl with the mixed greens and toss to combine.
Break the toasted pita bread into pieces and sprinkle it over the top of the salad.
Serve the smoky chicken fattoush immediately, garnished with additional sriracha sauce if desired.
